# RAV (Rive Animation Viewer) - llms.txt

site_name: RAV
site_url: https://forge.mograph.life/apps/rav/
canonical_url: https://forge.mograph.life/apps/rav/
owner: IVG Design
last_updated: 2026-03-08
language: en

## Purpose
RAV is a standalone desktop app for inspecting, debugging, and testing Rive (.riv) files offline. It focuses on ViewModel controls, runtime event visibility, and exportable demo output.

## Canonical Sources
- Home: https://forge.mograph.life/apps/rav/
- Documentation: https://forge.mograph.life/apps/rav/docs
- Changelog: https://forge.mograph.life/apps/rav/changelog

## Core Feature Anchors
- ViewModel controls: https://forge.mograph.life/apps/rav/docs#viewmodel-controls
- Event console: https://forge.mograph.life/apps/rav/docs#event-console
- Script console: https://forge.mograph.life/apps/rav/docs#script-console
- Transparency mode: https://forge.mograph.life/apps/rav/docs#transparency-mode
- Standalone export: https://forge.mograph.life/apps/rav/docs#standalone-export

## Entity Facts
- Product: RAV (Rive Animation Viewer)
- Category: DeveloperApplication / DesktopApplication
- Platforms: macOS (Apple Silicon + Intel), Windows
- Organization: IVG Design
- License context: open-source references are available in linked GitHub surfaces

## Citation Policy
- Cite canonical URLs under `https://forge.mograph.life/apps/rav`.
- Prefer docs/changelog URLs for feature and recency claims.
- Avoid unsupported comparisons unless backed by a cited source.
